mapper.sql: sm.id, sm.parent_id, sm.depth, sm.menu_name, sm.menu_code, sm.menu_type, sm.url_path, sm.link_url, sm.board_id, sm.page_id, sm.icon, sm.target, sm.sort_order, sm.is_visible, sm.is_login_required, sm.start_at, sm.end_at, sm.seo_title, sm.seo_description, sm.created_at, sm.created_by, sm.updated_at, sm.updated_by, sm.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , pm.menu_name AS parent_menu_name, b.board_name AS board_name, b.board_code AS board_code, sp.page_code AS page_code, sp.page_title AS page_title, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_menu child WHERE child.parent_id = sm.id AND child.deleted = false) AS child_count FROM site_menu sm LEFT JOIN site_menu pm ON sm.parent_id = pm.id AND pm.deleted = false LEFT JOIN board b ON sm.board_id = b.id AND b.deleted = false LEFT JOIN site_page sp ON sm.page_id = sp.id AND sp.deleted = false WHERE sm.deleted = false ORDER BY sm.depth ASC, sm.sort_order ASC, sm.id ASC

SELECT , NULL AS parent_menu_name, b.board_name AS board_name, b.board_code AS board_code, sp.page_code AS page_code, sp.page_title AS page_title, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_menu child WHERE child.parent_id = sm.id AND child.deleted = false) AS child_count FROM site_menu sm LEFT JOIN board b ON sm.board_id = b.id AND b.deleted = false LEFT JOIN site_page sp ON sm.page_id = sp.id AND sp.deleted = false WHERE sm.deleted = false AND sm.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY sm.sort_order ASC, sm.id ASC

SELECT , pm.menu_name AS parent_menu_name, b.board_name AS board_name, b.board_code AS board_code, sp.page_code AS page_code, sp.page_title AS page_title, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_menu child WHERE child.parent_id = sm.id AND child.deleted = false) AS child_count FROM site_menu sm LEFT JOIN site_menu pm ON sm.parent_id = pm.id AND pm.deleted = false LEFT JOIN board b ON sm.board_id = b.id AND b.deleted = false LEFT JOIN site_page sp ON sm.page_id = sp.id AND sp.deleted = false WHERE sm.deleted = false AND sm.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sm.sort_order ASC, sm.id ASC

SELECT , pm.menu_name AS parent_menu_name, b.board_name AS board_name, b.board_code AS board_code, sp.page_code AS page_code, sp.page_title AS page_title, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_menu child WHERE child.parent_id = sm.id AND child.deleted = false) AS child_count FROM site_menu sm LEFT JOIN site_menu pm ON sm.parent_id = pm.id AND pm.deleted = false LEFT JOIN board b ON sm.board_id = b.id AND b.deleted = false LEFT JOIN site_page sp ON sm.page_id = sp.id AND sp.deleted = false WHERE sm.deleted = false AND sm.id = #{id}

SELECT , pm.menu_name AS parent_menu_name, b.board_name AS board_name, b.board_code AS board_code, sp.page_code AS page_code, sp.page_title AS page_title, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_menu child WHERE child.parent_id = sm.id AND child.deleted = false) AS child_count FROM site_menu sm LEFT JOIN site_menu pm ON sm.parent_id = pm.id AND pm.deleted = false LEFT JOIN board b ON sm.board_id = b.id AND b.deleted = false LEFT JOIN site_page sp ON sm.page_id = sp.id AND sp.deleted = false WHERE sm.deleted = false AND sm.menu_code = #{menuCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM site_menu WHERE deleted = false AND parent_id = #{parentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_menu ( parent_id, depth, menu_name, menu_code, menu_type, url_path, link_url, board_id, page_id, icon, target, sort_order, is_visible, is_login_required, start_at, end_at, seo_title, seo_description, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{depth}, #{menuName}, #{menuCode}, #{menuType}, #{urlPath}, #{linkUrl}, #{boardId}, #{pageId}, #{icon}, #{target}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{isLoginRequired}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoDescription}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, false )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, depth = #{depth}, menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_type = #{menuType}, url_path = #{urlPath}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, board_id = #{boardId}, page_id = #{pageId}, icon = #{icon}, target = #{target}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_visible = #{isVisible}, is_login_required = #{isLoginRequired}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, seo_title = #{seoTitle}, seo_description = #{seoDescription}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
